headline: Workday (WDAY) Just Partnered With Amazon And Short Sellers Are Still Dominating
summary: Workday Inc. (NASDAQ:WDAY) is one of the 7 Worst Cloud Stocks To Buy According to Short Sellers. On June 2, Workday Inc. (NASDAQ:WDAY) announced a new integration between its data cloud and Amazon Web Services. This integration will allow developers to use Workday’s HR and financial data with Amazon Web Services.
